descriptions.text: Pokémon: Liquid Crystal is a complete remake of the original Pokémon Crystal game for the GameBoy Color. The story is the same as the original Crystal with a load of extra events and even a brand new region to explore; the Orange Islands.

While playing Pokémon: Liquid Crystal you will experience the original main story from Pokémon Crystal, with additional events placed in and around it. Expect to see new evil teams, rivals, and other twists throughout.
